message:
feat(parser): expand DOT/mermaid parsers with subgraph, attribute, and diagram type support

DOT parser (+195 lines):
- Subgraph/cluster parsing with nested node/edge declarations
- Attribute list parsing for node, edge, and graph-level attributes
- HTML label support and escape sequence handling
- Improved edge declaration parsing with port support

IR builder (+51 lines):
- Extended IR construction for subgraph cluster mapping
- Attribute-to-IR-property conversion helpers

Mermaid parser (+297 lines):
- Expanded diagram type detection and parsing for state, gantt, pie,
  quadrant, packet, gitgraph, C4, and XY chart diagrams
- Style directive parsing (classDef, style, linkStyle)
- Subgraph declaration parsing with direction inheritance
- Click/interaction handler parsing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
